steps.title: Find when the coefficient equals f(1)
steps.content: The coefficient equals $f(1)$ only when the exponential part becomes $1$ at $x=1$. That happens when the exponent is $0$ at $x=1$.

steps.title: Evaluate f(1) for choice C
steps.content:
For choice C, $f(x)=128(2)^{x-1}$:
$$f(1)=128(2)^{1-1}=128(2)^0=128$$
The coefficient is $k$, so choice C is correct.
